summary: Test suite covers core requirements (cartesian product, include/exclude rules, max-size validation, JSON output, workflow structure) but has significant gaps. Pester unit tests test the core functions but miss: the CLI wrapper (Invoke-MatrixGenerator), file I/O error handling, 3+ axis combinations, multiple exclude rules together, and edge cases (null axes, empty arrays, type conversion). Act integration tests cover only 3 happy-path fixtures with no error scenarios. Missing rigor: no tests for invalid JSON, missing config file, boundary conditions, property ordering, or complex rule interactions. Well-organized but incomplete—would miss non-trivial regressions in edge cases and error paths.
